code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant orch_api as Orchestration
    participant auth_frontend as Authentication Frontend
    participant auth_external_api as Authentication External API
    participant auth_internal_api as Authentication Internal API
    participant account_interventions as Account Interventions API
    participant notification_queue as NotificationHandler.java Lambda   
    participant notify as Notify   
    orch_api ->> auth_frontend : OAuth 2.0 Authorization request 302 redirect to /authorize
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend : Decrypt and validate request and create session    
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /start (Infra_WorkerNode)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Start helps calculate current state
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend : StartResponse.java object returned
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend : State machine works out where to send user based on start response
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /user-exists (Infra_LoadBalancer)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Checks if account with email already exists
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: CheckUserExistsResponse.java object returned
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend: Validates that the user already has an account
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /account-interventions (Infra_EtcdCluster)
    auth_internal_api ->> account_interventions : Request to account interventions api (Infra_LoadBalancer)
    account_interventions ->> auth_internal_api : Response from Account Interventions containing blocked=true
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Generates audit event for "blocked" Account Intervention
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: AccountInterventions.java object returned containing blocked intervention
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend: Prevents user from performing password reset due to blocked intervention
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /login (Infra_RedisCache)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Validates if password is correct
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: LoginResponse.java object returned
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /account-recovery (Infra_LoadBalancer)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Calculates whether account recovery is permitted
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: AccountRecovery.java object returned
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /mfa (Infra_RedisCache)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Generates and stores OTP
    auth_internal_api -->> notification_queue : Sends NotifyRequest.java object via SQS
    notification_queue -->> notify : Request to send SMS containing OTP and phone number
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend : 204 response 
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend: Prevents user from performing MFA reset due to blocked intervention
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /verify-code (Infra_WorkerNode)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Validates whether SMS MFA code is valid
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: 204 response
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend : Displays Blocked intervention screen

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个完整的账户干预流程时序图，核心场景是：用户尝试登录时，系统发现账户被block了，然后阻止后续操作。起点是Orchestration层发起OAuth 2.0授权请求。
明白，Orchestration通过302重定向把请求发到Authentication Frontend。那Frontend收到后是先解密验证，还是直接透传给后端API？
Frontend要先自己处理，解密并验证请求，然后创建session。接着它会调用Authentication Internal API的/start接口，这个请求是打到Infra_WorkerNode上的。
好的，Internal API在WorkerNode上执行start逻辑，计算当前状态，然后返回StartResponse.java对象给Frontend。我画一条返回消息。
接下来Frontend的状态机要根据start response决定用户流向。然后它会调用/user-exists检查邮箱是否已注册，这个请求走Infra_LoadBalancer。
收到，Internal API检查账户是否存在，返回CheckUserExistsResponse.java。Frontend验证用户已有账户后，下一步是调用/account-interventions对吧？
对，但这里有个细节：Internal API不是直接处理，而是再转发给Account Interventions API，这个调用也是走Infra_LoadBalancer。最终返回的响应里blocked=true。
画好了。Internal API收到blocked响应后，还要生成审计事件，然后把AccountInterventions.java对象返回给Frontend。Frontend这时候要阻止密码重置操作。
流程继续，Frontend还是会尝试走登录流程，调用/login到Infra_RedisCache验证密码。验证通过后，再调用/account-recovery判断账户恢复是否允许。
这里MFA环节怎么触发？是登录成功后才走MFA吗？还有通知服务是怎么接入的？
是的，Frontend调用/mfa到Infra_RedisCache，Internal API生成OTP后，通过SQS发送NotifyRequest.java给NotificationHandler.java Lambda，再由它调用Notify服务发SMS。
画好了异步消息。Internal API返回204，Frontend由于blocked干预阻止MFA重置，然后调用/verify-code验证短信码，这个打到Infra_WorkerNode。
验证通过后返回204，最后Frontend显示Blocked intervention screen。不过我需要确认一下，/account-interventions的请求路径上，Internal API到Account Interventions API之间，基础设施标注对吗？
啊，我检查一下——Frontend到Internal API的/account-interventions请求应该标注Infra_EtcdCluster，但我之前可能漏标了。Internal API再到Account Interventions API才是Infra_LoadBalancer。我修正一下。
修正后是对的。另外确认一下，整个流程里Orchestration只出现在最开始发起OAuth请求，后面不再参与对吗？
确认，Orchestration只在第一步通过302重定向触发流程，后续所有交互都在Frontend、Internal API、Account Interventions API和通知服务之间完成。最终用户看到Blocked干预页面。
